LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF COIT VENTURE PARTNERS LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DENIED. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO SUSTAIN ITS SUMMARY ADJUDICATION BURDEN UNDER CCP 437C. THE FIRST AMENDED AND RESTATED ENABLING DECLARATION APPEARS TO BE ONE OF THE CONTROLLING DOCUMENTS AND PLAINTIFF DOES NOT SUBSTANTIVELY ADDRESS THAT DOCUMENT. REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE OF FIRST AMENDED AND RESTATED ENABLING DECLARATION IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF'S ORDER ON OBJECTIONS TO EVIDENCE AND ORDER ON THE MOTION SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077

Argued and PLAINTIFF COIT VENTURE PARTNERS LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED'S Motion To Compel Further Discovery Responses And Requests For Production Of Documents is granted. Defendant to comply with Document request (second set) and Further responses to Form interrogatories by 12/12/11. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn, not reported.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-18-2011 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION
Off Calendar Nov-09-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
David M. Gonden, Esq., of Trombadore-Gonden Law Group LLP, 415-439-8372, for Plaintiff and moving party
John S. Warnlof, Esq., Law Office, 925-937-9200, for Defendant and opposing party

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: PLAINTIFF COIT VENTURE PARTNERS LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION is denied. Plaintiff fails to sustain its summary adjudication burden under CCP 437c. The First Amended and Restated Enabling Declaration appears to be one of the controlling documents and Plaintiff does not substantively address that document. Request for Judicial Notice of First Amended and Restated Enabling Declaration is granted. Plaintiff's order on objections to evidence and order on the motion signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION
Off Calendar Oct-25-2011 Continued To Nov-09-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. J. THOMAS TROMBADORE OF TROMBADORE & GONDEN LAW GROUP, TEL. NO. 439-8373 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. JOHN SKINNER WARNLOF APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: Plaintiff Coit Venture Partners' Motion for Summary Adjudication is continued to November 9, 2011. The court did receive courtesy copies of the opposition papers in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077 = (302/HEK)
